exampleSentences: Bố của anh ấy làm việc ở một công ty lớn trong thành phố.
Tối nay em sẽ nấu món ăn mà bố thích nhất.
Cuối tuần này cả nhà chúng ta sẽ đi dã ngoại cùng bố.
notes:
Bố means father or dad. It’s what you call or refer to your male parent in a normal, everyday way.

It’s a noun. You usually don’t need a classifier when talking about your own dad; just say bố + của + person when you specify whose father.  

In the South, people often say ba instead of bố — same meaning, just regional.  

It’s warm and neutral, not overly formal like phụ thân.

example.en: My dad is a very good person.
example.es: Mi papá es una persona muy buena.
example.vi: Bố tôi là một người rất tốt.

exampleSentencesTranslated: His father works at a big company in the city.
Tonight I will cook the dish that father likes the most.
This weekend our whole family will go on a picnic with father.
notes_md:
**Bố** means *father* or *dad*. It’s what you call or refer to your male parent in a normal, everyday way.

It’s a noun. You usually don’t need a classifier when talking about your own dad; just say **bố + của + person** when you specify whose father.  


In the South, people often say **ba** instead of **bố** — same meaning, just regional.  

It’s warm and neutral, not overly formal like *phụ thân*.
